item.title: Cursor has reportedly surpassed $2B in annualized revenue
item.description: The four-year-old startup saw its revenue run rate double over the past three months, according to one Bloomberg source.

item.title: India’s Pronto formalizes house help as its valuation jumps 8x in under a year
item.description: Pronto handles 18,000 daily bookings and plans rapid expansion as it races rivals to digitize India's largely offline home services market.

item.title: ChatGPT uninstalls surged by 295% after DoD deal
item.description: Many consumers ditched ChatGPT's app after news of its DoD deal went live, while Claude's downloads grew.

item.title: Stripe wants to turn your AI costs into a profit center
item.description: Stripe released a preview intended to allow AI companies to easily track, pass through, and make a profit on underlying AI model fees.

item.title: Geopolitical drama reportedly stalls IPO of SoftBank-backed PayPay
item.description: The Japan-based company reportedly aimed for a public valuation of at least ¥1.5 trillion ($10 billion).
